scope: Add IntegratedNetworkDiskIoRecord as first-class integrated scenario evidence
Tie N19 NetworkBenchmark and B22 BlockBenchmark evidence into one generation-checked concurrent IO scenario
Require exact generations for NetworkBenchmark, BlockBenchmark, Store, NetworkStackAdapter, PacketDevice, Socket, FakeBlockBackend, BlockDevice, BlockRequestQueue, and BlockDmaBuffer
Derive concurrent window, combined throughput, and max p99 latency from semantic benchmark evidence
Reject missing, stale, unrecorded, over-budget, or accounting-incomplete benchmark evidence
Emit IntegratedNetworkDiskIoRecorded event and stable osctl ViewV1 JSON
Expose historical graph edges without creating live ownership or adapter-internal semantic truth
Publish target_executor semantic package roots and count validation for X4 evidence
no_goals: new network or block third-party dependency

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: all integrated network/disk IO references carry kind/id/generation
integrated scenario uses Historical graph edges for network and block benchmark attribution
osctl exposes stable ViewV1 JSON and contract validation output

findings_fixed: contract graph models IntegratedNetworkDiskIo as exact-generation evidence
contract graph resolves socket, block request queue, and block DMA buffer refs instead of treating them as debug-only labels
target_executor writes X4 records, roots, and counts into the semantic package
osctl command, inspect, replay, and graph history expose integrated-network-disk-io evidence through stable ViewV1 JSON
semantic validation rejects stale block benchmark generations and missing evidence
bad_smells_checked: No smoltcp, virtio, fatfs, or ext4 internal state became semantic truth
No real concurrent hardware IO execution is claimed
No adapter internal structs are serialized as osctl stable views
No target-side cwasm execution path was changed
No third-party dependency was introduced in semantic_core
residual_notes: X5 owns display update during scheduler load
Future real IO runtime must feed the same semantic benchmark objects rather than replacing the X4 integrated evidence contract

validation_commands.command: cargo check -p semantic_core -p artifact_manifest -p contract_core -p target_executor -p osctl

residual_gaps: X5 owns display update during scheduler load
Real network/disk concurrent IO must later provide substrate-backed benchmark evidence through the existing semantic objects
